title: Scope D T-D4: hook renderer — meta auto-refreshed banner line + i18n key
description: In renderSummary (knowledge-hint-broad.cjs:449-481), detect payload.auto_healed === true and insert ONE additional line BEFORE the usage hint footer: `🔄 Fabric: meta auto-refreshed (sha X → Y)` using 8-char short hash prefixes. Add corresponding i18n key `metaAutoRefreshedBanner` in banner-i18n.cjs with en + zh-CN variants.

files.change: After existing `revision_hash` line (around line 477) but BEFORE the usage-hint footer (line 479), add: `if (payload.auto_healed === true && payload.previous_revision_hash && payload.revision_hash) { const prev = String(payload.previous_revision_hash).slice(0, 8); const cur = String(payload.revision_hash).slice(0, 8); lines.push(banners.metaAutoRefreshedBanner(prev, cur)); }`. Source banners via the banner-i18n.cjs helper (existing module load path).

Add new key `metaAutoRefreshedBanner: (prev, cur) => ...` with two language variants matching existing en + zh-CN pattern. EN: `🔄 Fabric: meta auto-refreshed (sha ${prev} → ${cur})`. zh-CN: `🔄 Fabric: 元数据已自动刷新 (sha ${prev} → ${cur})`. NOTE: project instructions say avoid emojis unless requested; user task description explicitly requested 🔄 emoji here, so keep it.

Tests: (1) payload without auto_healed → no auto-refresh line in output; (2) payload with auto_healed:true + both hashes → exactly one auto-refresh line inserted before usage-hint footer; (3) auto_healed:true but missing previous_revision_hash → no line (defensive); (4) short-hash slicing produces 8-char prefixes; (5) zh-CN locale fixture renders Chinese variant.

implementation: Add metaAutoRefreshedBanner key to banner-i18n.cjs with en + zh-CN variants
Update renderSummary to detect auto_healed and push the new line BEFORE usage-hint footer
Re-verify line ordering: banner → entries body → revision_hash → auto-refresh (NEW) → usage hint
Run `pnpm test` for hook tests + manual smoke (echo a synthesized payload through the hook)

reference.pattern: Existing renderSummary line-push flow + banner-i18n.cjs key pattern
reference.examples: Existing `lines.push(usage-hint-footer)` is the precedent — insert new push before that one

criteria: Payload with auto_healed:true + both hashes → exactly ONE auto-refresh line in stderr output, positioned before usage-hint footer
Payload without auto_healed → no auto-refresh line
metaAutoRefreshedBanner key exists in banner-i18n.cjs with en + zh-CN variants

rationale.chosen_approach: Single additional line — minimal visual noise, conditional on actual heal event
alternatives_considered: Always show revision hash transition (too noisy)
decision_factors: Operators need a breadcrumb when meta drifts
Once per stale-detection event is the right cadence
rationale.tradeoffs: Banner i18n needs zh-CN translation maintenance (small cost)

manual_checks: Synthesize an auto_healed payload, pipe via `node .claude/hooks/knowledge-hint-broad.cjs` stdin, observe stderr
success_metrics: 5 tests green; manual smoke shows correct line ordering
